purpose: Extend the MAMMAL-vs-ESM-650M head-to-head from the 25-protein/5-family toy panel onto the 40-gene CRISPR-N panel. Same recipe (mean-pool + cosine), MAMMAL numbers reused from results/phase5_crispr_panel_*.json.

centered_anisotropy_check.note: Mean-centered embeddings before cosine (standard ESM anisotropy fix). If centered NN recall is still < MAMMAL, the MAMMAL win is not a raw-cosine artifact.

head_to_head.recall_call: MAMMAL wins NN recall (0.750 vs ESM-650M 0.725)
head_to_head.note_on_gap: Cosine gap is NOT comparable across architectures — ESM raw-cosine bands sit very high (anisotropy), so its gap looks tiny even when NN recall is decent. NN recall is the decision metric; gap is context.
